name: sqlite
description: MCP server exposing SQLite database tools (query, execute, list_tables, describe_table, create_table). Read-only by default; writes are opt-in via --allow-writes or MCP_SQLITE_ALLOW_WRITES=true. Use when inspecting, querying, or (when enabled) modifying SQLite databases.

interface.shortDescription: MCP server exposing SQLite database tools (query, execute, list_tables, describe_table, create_table). Read-only by default; writes are opt-in via --allow-writes or...
interface.longDescription: MCP server exposing SQLite database tools (query, execute, list_tables, describe_table, create_table). Read-only by default; writes are opt-in via --allow-writes or MCP_SQLITE_ALLOW_WRITES=true. Use when inspecting, querying, or (when enabled) modifying SQLite databases.
defaultPrompt: Use the sqlite MCP tools for this task.
